Part.Source:
Event Start
loadwwpContext.Call(&WWPContext) if &WWPContext.Old_Perfil <> 3 Dashboard.Link() EndIf
&STSAuthorizationUserGUID.Visible = False &AutoRegisterAnomymousUser.Visible = False
&User = GAMUser.Get() If &Mode <> GAMAPiMode.Insert &Application.Load(&Id) &Id = &Application.Id &GUID = &Application.GUID &Name = &Application.Name &Dsc = &Application.Description &Version = &Application.Version &Copyright = &Application.Copyright &Company = &Application.CompanyName &UseAbsoluteUrlByEnvironment= &Application.UseAbsoluteUrlByEnvironment &HomeObject = &Application.HomeObject &AccountActivationObject = &Application.AccountActivationObject &LogoutObject = &Application.LogoutObject &MainMenu.AddItem(0,"(none)") For &Menu in &Application.GetMenus(&MenuFilter, &Errors) &MainMenu.AddItem(&Menu.Id, &Menu.Name) Endfor &MainMenu = &Application.MainMenuId &AccessRequiresPermission = &Application.AccessRequiresPermission &AutoRegisterAnomymousUser = &Application.ClientAutoRegisterAnomymousUser &ClientId = &Application.ClientId &ClientSecret = &Application.ClientSecret &ClientAccessUniqueByUser = &Application.ClientAccessUniqueByUser &ClientRevoked = &Application.ClientRevoked &ClientAllowRemoteAuth = &Application.ClientAllowRemoteAuthentication &ClientAllowGetUserRoles = &Application.ClientAllowGetUserRoles &ClientAllowGetUserAddData = &Application.ClientAllowGetUserAdditionalData &ClientAllowGetSessionIniProp = &Application.ClientAllowGetSessionInitialProperties &ClientImageURL = &Application.ClientImageURL &ClientLocalLoginURL = &Application.ClientLocalLoginURL &ClientCallbackURL = &Application.ClientCallbackURL &ClientCallbackURLisCustom = &Application.ClientCallbackURLisCustom &ClientCallbackURLStateName = &Application.ClientCallbackURLStateName
//GAMRemoteRest Authentication &ClientAllowRemoteRestAuth = &Application.ClientAllowRemoteRestAuthentication &ClientAllowGetUserRolesRest = &Application.ClientAllowGetUserRolesRest &ClientAllowGetUserAddDataRest = &Application.ClientAllowGetUserAdditionalDataRest &ClientAllowGetSessionIniPropRest = &Application.ClientAllowGetSessionInitialPropertiesRest //Remote authentication Generals &ClientEncryptionKey = &Application.ClientEncryptionKey &ClientRepositoryGUID = &Application.ClientRepositoryGUID //SSO Rest &SSORestEnable = &Application.SSORestEnable &SSORestMode = &Application.SSORestMode &SSORestUserAuthTypeName = &Application.SSORestUserAuthenticationTypeName &SSORestServerURL = &Application.SSORestServerURL //STS Protocol &STSProtocolEnable = &Application.STSProtocolEnable &GAMUser.Load(&Application.STSAuthorizationUserGUID) &STSAuthorizationUserName = &GAMUser.Name &STSMode = &Application.STSMode &STSServerURL = &Application.STSServerURL &STSServerClientPassword = &Application.STSServerClientPassword &STSServerRepositoryGUID = &Application.STSServerRepositoryGUID &EnvironmentName = &Application.Environment.Name &EnvironmentSecureProtocol = &Application.Environment.SecureProtocol &EnvironmentHost = &Application.Environment.Host &EnvironmentPort = &Application.Environment.Port &EnvironmentVirtualDirectory= &Application.Environment.VirtualDirectory &EnvironmentProgramPackage = &Application.Environment.ProgramPackage &EnvironmentProgramExtension= &Application.Environment.ProgramExtension If &Application.ClientRevoked.IsEmpty() BtnRevokeAllow.Caption = "WWP_GAM_Revoke" Else BtnRevokeAllow.Caption = "WWP_GAM_Authorize" Endif Endif If &Mode = GAMAPiMode.Display or &Mode = GAMAPiMode.Delete &GUID.Enabled = False &Name.Enabled = False &Dsc.Enabled = False &Version.Enabled = False &Copyright.Enabled = False &Company.Enabled = False &UseAbsoluteUrlByEnvironment.Enabled= False &HomeObject.Enabled = False &AccountActivationObject.Enabled = False &LogoutObject.Enabled = False &MainMenu.Enabled = False &AccessRequiresPermission.Enabled = False &ClientId.Enabled = False &ClientSecret.Enabled = False &ClientAccessUniqueByUser.Enabled = False &ClientRevoked.Enabled = False &ClientAllowRemoteAuth.Enabled = False &ClientAllowGetUserRoles.Enabled = False &ClientAllowGetUserAddData.Enabled = False &ClientAllowGetSessionIniProp.Enabled = False &ClientAllowRemoteRestAuth.Enabled = False &ClientAllowGetUserRolesRest.Enabled = False &ClientAllowGetUserAddDataRest.Enabled = False &ClientAllowGetSessionIniPropRest.Enabled = False &ClientLocalLoginURL.Enabled = False &ClientCallbackURL.Enabled = False &ClientCallbackURLisCustom.Enabled = False &ClientCallbackURLStateName.Enabled = False &ClientImageURL.Enabled = False &ClientEncryptionKey.Enabled = False &ClientRepositoryGUID.Enabled = False &SSORestEnable.Enabled = False &SSORestMode.Enabled = False &SSORestUserAuthTypeName.Enabled = False &SSORestServerURL.Enabled = False &STSProtocolEnable.Enabled = False &STSAuthorizationUserName.Enabled = False &STSMode.Enabled = False &STSServerURL.Enabled = False &STSServerClientPassword.Enabled = False &STSServerRepositoryGUID.Enabled = False &EnvironmentName.Enabled = False &EnvironmentSecureProtocol.Enabled = False &EnvironmentHost.Enabled = False &EnvironmentPort.Enabled = False &EnvironmentVirtualDirectory.Enabled= False &EnvironmentProgramPackage.Enabled = False &EnvironmentProgramExtension.Enabled= False BtnGenerateKeyGAMRemote.Visible = False BtnEnter.Caption = "WWP_GAM_Delete" Endif Do "UI_RemoteAuthenticationWeb" Do "UI_RemoteAuthenticationRest" Do "UI_SSORest" Do "UI_STSProtocol" If &Mode = GAMAPiMode.Display BtnEnter.Visible = False Endif
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do 'AttributesSecurityCode' &AutoRegisterAnomymousUser.Visible = False &STSAuthorizationUserGUID.Visible = False
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
TextBlockTitle.Caption = Form.Caption
EndEvent
Event 'DoGenerateKeyGAMRemote'
&ClientEncryptionKey = GetEncryptionKey()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoRevokeAllow'
&Application.Load(&Id) If &Application.ClientRevoked.IsEmpty() &isOk = &Application.RevokeClient(&Errors) Else &isOk = &Application.AuthorizeClient(&Errors) Endif If &isOk If &Application.ClientRevoked.IsEmpty() BtnRevokeAllow.Caption = "WWP_GAM_Revoke" Else BtnRevokeAllow.Caption = "WWP_GAM_Authorize" Endif Commit Refresh Else Do 'Errors' EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Sub 'AttributesSecurityCode'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If Not (&STSMode = GAMSTSModes.ClientFull Or &STSMode = GAMSTSModes.ClientGetToken) &STSServerClientPassword.Visible = False STSServerClientPassword_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &STSServerClientPassword.Visible = True STSServerClientPassword_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 DataContentCell' EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Event Enter
If &Mode <> TrnMode.Insert &Application.Load(&Id) Endif Do Case Case &Mode = GAMAPiMode.Insert or &Mode = GAMAPiMode.Update &Application.Name = &Name &Application.Description = &Dsc &Application.Version = &Version &Application.Copyright = &Copyright &Application.CompanyName = &Company &Application.UseAbsoluteUrlByEnvironment = &UseAbsoluteUrlByEnvironment &Application.HomeObject = &HomeObject &Application.AccountActivationObject = &AccountActivationObject &Application.LogoutObject = &LogoutObject &Application.MainMenuId = &MainMenu &Application.AccessRequiresPermission = &AccessRequiresPermission &Application.ClientAutoRegisterAnomymousUser = &AutoRegisterAnomymousUser &Application.ClientId = &ClientId &Application.ClientSecret = &ClientSecret &Application.ClientAccessUniqueByUser = &ClientAccessUniqueByUser &Application.ClientAllowRemoteAuthentication = &ClientAllowRemoteAuth &Application.ClientAllowGetUserRoles = &ClientAllowGetUserRoles &Application.ClientAllowGetUserAdditionalData = &ClientAllowGetUserAddData &Application.ClientAllowGetSessionInitialProperties = &ClientAllowGetSessionIniProp &Application.ClientLocalLoginURL = &ClientLocalLoginURL &Application.ClientCallbackURL = &ClientCallbackURL &Application.ClientCallbackURLisCustom = &ClientCallbackURLisCustom &Application.ClientCallbackURLStateName = &ClientCallbackURLStateName &Application.ClientImageURL = &ClientImageURL &Application.ClientAllowRemoteRestAuthentication = &ClientAllowRemoteRestAuth &Application.ClientAllowGetUserRolesRest = &ClientAllowGetUserRolesRest &Application.ClientAllowGetUserAdditionalDataRest = &ClientAllowGetUserAddDataRest &Application.ClientAllowGetSessionInitialPropertiesRest = &ClientAllowGetSessionIniPropRest &Application.ClientEncryptionKey = &ClientEncryptionKey &Application.ClientRepositoryGUID = &ClientRepositoryGUID &Application.SSORestEnable = &SSORestEnable &Application.SSORestMode = &SSORestMode &Application.SSORestUserAuthenticationTypeName = &SSORestUserAuthTypeName &Application.SSORestServerURL = &SSORestServerURL &Application.STSProtocolEnable = &STSProtocolEnable If not &STSAuthorizationUserName.IsEmpty() &GAMUser = &GAMUser.GetByLogin(!"local",&STSAuthorizationUserName,&UserErrors) &STSAuthorizationUserGUID = &GAMUser.GUID Endif &Application.STSAuthorizationUserGUID = &STSAuthorizationUserGUID &Application.STSMode = &STSMode &Application.STSServerURL = &STSServerURL &Application.STSServerClientPassword = &STSServerClientPassword &Application.STSServerRepositoryGUID = &STSServerRepositoryGUID &Application.Environment.Name = &EnvironmentName &Application.Environment.SecureProtocol = &EnvironmentSecureProtocol &Application.Environment.Host = &EnvironmentHost &Application.Environment.Port = &EnvironmentPort &Application.Environment.VirtualDirectory = &EnvironmentVirtualDirectory &Application.Environment.ProgramPackage = &EnvironmentProgramPackage &Application.Environment.ProgramExtension = &EnvironmentProgramExtension &Application.Save() Case &Mode = GAMAPiMode.Delete &Application.Delete() EndCase If &Application.Success() and &UserErrors.Count = 0 Commit GAMWWApplications() Else &Errors = &Application.GetErrors() Do 'Errors' EndIf
EndEvent
Event &ClientAllowRemoteAuth.Click
Do "UI_RemoteAuthenticationWeb"
EndEvent
Event &ClientAllowRemoteRestAuth.Click
Do "UI_RemoteAuthenticationRest"
EndEvent
Event &SSORestMode.Click
Do "UI_SSORest"
EndEvent
Event &STSProtocolEnable.Click
Do "UI_STSProtocol"
EndEvent
Event &STSMode.Click
Do Case Case &STSMode = GAMSTSModes.Server TableSTSServerCheckToken.Visible = True TableSTSClient.Visible = False Case &STSMode = GAMSTSModes.ClientGetToken TableSTSServerCheckToken.Visible = False TableSTSClient.Visible = True Case &STSMode = GAMSTSModes.ClientCheckToken TableSTSServerCheckToken.Visible = True TableSTSClient.Visible = True Case &STSMode = GAMSTSModes.ClientFull TableSTSServerCheckToken.Visible = True TableSTSClient.Visible = True EndCase Do 'AttributesSecurityCode'
EndEvent
Event &SSORestEnable.Click
Do "UI_SSORest"
EndEvent
Sub 'Errors'
If &Errors.Count > 0 For &Error in &Errors Msg(Format(!"%1 (GAM%2)", &Error.Message, &Error.Code)) EndFor EndIf If &UserErrors.Count > 0 For &Error in &UserErrors Msg(Format(!"%1 (GAM%2)", &Error.Message, &Error.Code)) EndFor EndIf
EndSub
Sub "UI_RemoteAuthenticationWeb"
If &ClientAllowRemoteAuth TblWebAuth.Visible = True TblGeneralAuth.Visible = True Else TblWebAuth.Visible = False If not &ClientAllowRemoteRestAuth TblGeneralAuth.Visible = False Endif Endif
EndSub
Sub "UI_RemoteAuthenticationRest"
If &ClientAllowRemoteRestAuth TblRestAuth.Visible = True TblGeneralAuth.Visible = True Else TblRestAuth.Visible = False If not &ClientAllowRemoteAuth TblGeneralAuth.Visible = False Endif Endif
EndSub
Sub "UI_SSORest"
If &SSORestEnable TableSSORest.Visible = True Do Case Case &SSORestMode = GeneXusSecurityCommon.GAMAppConnectionModes.Server TblSSORestModeClient.Visible = False Case &SSORestMode = GeneXusSecurityCommon.GAMAppConnectionModes.Client TblSSORestModeClient.Visible = True EndCase Else TableSSORest.Visible = False Endif
EndSub
Sub "UI_STSProtocol"
If &STSProtocolEnable TableSTS.Visible = True Do Case Case &STSMode = GAMSTSModes.Server TableSTSServerCheckToken.Visible = True TableSTSClient.Visible = False Case &STSMode = GAMSTSModes.ClientGetToken TableSTSServerCheckToken.Visible = False TableSTSClient.Visible = True Case &STSMode = GAMSTSModes.ClientCheckToken TableSTSServerCheckToken.Visible = True TableSTSClient.Visible = True Case &STSMode = GAMSTSModes.ClientFull TableSTSServerCheckToken.Visible = True TableSTSClient.Visible = True EndCase Else TableSTS.Visible = False Endif Do 'AttributesSecurityCode'
EndSub

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: User authentication type name in this server
